prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 13. Certain Relationships and Related Transactions, and Director Independence". The next section is "Item 14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services".
Find where Item 13 ends — right before the "Item 14" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 13 before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Nasdaq listing standards and applicable SEC rules. Our independent directors have regularly scheduled meetings at which only independent directors
are present.
